commands.narrative:
## Roster Changes Since Yesterday

No roster changes since yesterday's snapshot (2026-05-30). All 119 strategy slots remain identical in composition and enabled state.

## Headline

Sixteen strategies clear all four promotion gates today — eight at composite score 100 — yet the pending action-item backlog (10 items, oldest from 2026-05-27) remains unexecuted, allowing confirmed-INVALID bleeders to run for a fourth consecutive day.

## What's Accumulating SOL

The bot-excl-climbing family continues to dominate the leaderboard. **v25-bot-excl-climbing** (n=446, total=+8.805 SOL, drop3=+6.492 SOL, monthly=+15.66 SOL/mo) is the most seasoned strategy with the deepest outlier-stripped edge — drop3/total ratio of 73.7% confirms the edge is not concentrated in a few lucky trades. v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp (n=309, monthly=+17.98), v32-bot-excl-climbing-1s (n=267, monthly=+17.86), v33-bot-excl-climbing-ttp5 (n=269, monthly=+17.42), and v34-bot-excl-climbing-minlift (n=272, monthly=+17.82) all score 100/100 with STABLE edge and have been consistent winners for 4–5 consecutive days.

**New promotables this cycle:** v42-breakeven-20, v42-breakeven-15, and v42-breakeven-10 all crossed n=100 with score=100 and STABLE edge. These apply a breakeven-stop mechanic to the bot-excl-climbing signal — once up +X%, stop moves to entry. All three pass every gate (drop3: +1.835/+1.657/+0.937 SOL; monthly: +15.07/+14.31/+11.22 SOL/mo) and show no outlier concentration. These are the highest-confidence new promote candidates this cycle.

## What's Bleeding

**Pending kills still running (proposed ≥2 days ago):**
- **v10-best-double** (n=170, drop3=–1.965 SOL, score=50): loser 5 of 5 recorded days. Kill proposed 2026-05-27, not yet executed.
- **v35-vel2050-holders10** (n=160, total=–3.994 SOL, monthly=–14.36 SOL/mo, score=35): deeply negative. Kill proposed 2026-05-27.
- **v35-vel2050-top10-40** (n=156, total=–2.894 SOL, monthly=–10.41 SOL/mo, score=35): Kill proposed 2026-05-27.
- **v35-vel2050-top10-25-gini** (n=119, total=–3.010 SOL, monthly=–11.09 SOL/mo, score=30): Kill proposed 2026-05-30.
- **v14-sumabs-shadow** (n=129, total=–0.489 SOL, drop3=–2.160, score=30): Kill proposed 2026-05-27.

**Newly confirmed INVALID this cycle (just crossed n=100):**
- **v20-vel2050-dd-base** (n=100, total=–0.100 SOL, drop3=–2.615 SOL, monthly=–0.14 SOL/mo): fails 3 of 4 gates. Confirmed INVALID.
- **v20-vel2050-dd-sl20** (n=100, total=+0.328, drop3=–2.187): fails drop3 and monthly gates. Confirmed INVALID.
- **v15-vel5-10-dd-shadow** (n=106, drop3=–0.184, monthly=+0.40 SOL/mo): fails drop3 and monthly gates. Confirmed INVALID.

**Mirror contamination:** v10-best-double (confirmed INVALID) is still mirrored by v32-best-double-1s (n=64, total=–2.717), v33-best-double-ttp5 (n=64, total=–3.158), v34-best-double-minlift (n=64, total=–3.271), and v28-best-double-1s-ttp (n=71, total=–2.435) — all losing every day. Similarly, v20-vel2050-dd-base mirrors (v32/v33/v34-vel2050-dd-base-*) each show n=49, total=–2.1 to –2.6 SOL. These do not need to reach n=100 before killing — their base is confirmed INVALID.

## Cross-Day Patterns

**Persistent winners (5 of 5 recorded days):** v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp and v34-bot-excl-climbing-minlift. v25, v32, v33-bot-excl-climbing winner 4 of 5. The climbing signal is regime-stable and consistent — no mean-reversion visible in 7 days of data.

**Persistent losers (5 of 5 recorded days):** v10-best-double, v32/v33/v34-best-double-*, v32/v33/v34-vel2050-dd-base-*, v28-best-double-1s-ttp, V31.4/V31.5. The vel 20-50 + dd>–10% base (v10) is a confirmed no-edge filter that has contaminated 7+ mirror strategies still running.

**Regression flag — v39-entry-n50-100:** Proposed for promotion 2026-05-30 at score=100, n=128, drop3=+2.337 SOL, monthly=+17.60 SOL/mo. As of 2026-05-31: score=83.5 (DECAYING), drop3 dropped to +0.810 SOL, monthly to +11.33 SOL/mo, and the monthly gate now fails (promotable=False per system). The 05-30 promote proposal should be deferred until the strategy stabilizes. The regression in drop3 (+2.337 → +0.810) over ~40 additional trades is the key concern.

**Watch:** v40-acc-gate (n=95, score=84, STABLE edge, drop3=+3.243, monthly=+21.10 SOL/mo) is the strongest near-bar candidate — will likely cross n=100 within 1–2 days and should then pass all gates immediately.

## Outlier Check

Cross-checking the bot-excl-climbing family: drop3/total ratios are v25=73.7%, v28=51.9%, v32=60.0%, v33=52.8%, v34=41.6%. None are driven by 1–3 lottery trades. The v42-breakeven-20 (n=101) shows drop3/total=52.2% at its youngest data point — acceptable for the bar check. Recommendation to promote stands.

## Operator Next Step

**Execute the pending kill slate first** — the 5 confirmed INVALID strategies (v10, v35-holders10, v35-top10-40, v35-top10-25-gini, v14-sumabs-shadow) have collectively bled ~10+ SOL and are still running 4+ days after being proposed for kill. Add the 3 newly confirmed INVALIDs (v20-dd-base, v20-dd-sl20, v15-vel5-10-dd) and the 7 mirror strategies to complete the purge. Then promote v42-breakeven-20 alongside the pending bot-excl-climbing promotes.

winners.label: v34 v9shadow-velmono-dev mirror + trailingTP 10% drop + minLift 20pp [shadow]

anomalies.message: 16 strategies promotable (8 at score=100) with 10 promote proposals PROPOSED but not executed since 2026-05-27. Oldest items are 4 days stale.

5 confirmed INVALID bleeders (v10-best-double, v35-holders10, v35-top10-40, v35-top10-25-gini, v14-sumabs-shadow) still running 2–4 days after kill was proposed. Combined monthly drag estimated >-30 SOL/mo.
v39-entry-n50-100 regressed: drop3 dropped from +2.337 to +0.810 SOL, monthly from 17.60 to 11.33 SOL/mo, monthly gate now FAILS. Proposed promotion (ai-2026-05-30-003) should be deferred.
7 mirror strategies of confirmed-INVALID bases (v10 and v20-dd-base) still running, collectively bleeding 15+ SOL. Pre-emptive kill recommended without waiting for n=100.
3 strategies newly confirmed INVALID at n=100: v20-vel2050-dd-base, v20-vel2050-dd-sl20, v15-vel5-10-dd-shadow.

patterns: bot-excl-climbing family (v25/v28/v32/v33/v34) is the only consistent edge engine — winner in 4–5 of last 5 days across all variants.
vel 20-50 + dd>-10% (v10 base) is confirmed edge-less at n=170 with drop3=–1.965 SOL. All 4 mirror strategies are contaminated.
Breakeven-stop mechanic (v42 series) adds value over base at n=100 threshold — all three stop levels (10/15/20%) pass the bar with STABLE edge.
v40-acc-gate is the strongest pre-bar candidate: n=95, drop3=+3.243 SOL, monthly=+21.10 SOL/mo, STABLE edge. Expected to cross n=100 within days.

Trailing-SL strategies (v43 series) show negative performance: trailSL-15-7 (total=–1.089), trailSL-20-10 (–0.823), trailSL-be (–0.994). The trailing-SL mechanic appears to cut gains relative to the standard exit on this signal.

action_items.summary: Kill newly confirmed INVALID strategies: v20-vel2050-dd-base (n=100, total=–0.100 SOL, drop3=–2.615), v20-vel2050-dd-sl20 (n=100, drop3=–2.187), v15-vel5-10-dd-shadow (n=106, drop3=–0.184). All three hit n=100 and fail ≥2 gates.

Pre-emptive kill of 7 mirror strategies with confirmed-INVALID bases. Best-double mirrors (v32/v33/v34-best-double-*, v28-best-double-1s-ttp) total –2.4 to –3.3 SOL each. DD-base mirrors (v32/v33/v34-vel2050-dd-base-*) total –2.1 to –2.6 SOL. Bases (v10 and v20-dd-base) are confirmed INVALID at n>=100.
Promote v42-breakeven-20 to live — score=100, STABLE, n=101, drop3=+1.835 SOL, monthly=+15.07 SOL/mo. All 4 gates clear. Breakeven-stop at +20% on bot-excl-climbing signal.
Promote v42-breakeven-15 to live — score=100, STABLE, n=102, drop3=+1.657 SOL, monthly=+14.31 SOL/mo. All 4 gates clear.
Promote v42-breakeven-10 to live — score=100, STABLE, n=103, drop3=+0.937 SOL, monthly=+11.22 SOL/mo. All 4 gates clear. Thinnest drop3 of the three — verify regime stability before executing.

commands.action_item_note: Strategy v39-entry-n50-100 regressed since 05-30 proposal: score 100→83.5 (DECAYING), drop_top3 dropped from +2.337→+0.810 SOL, monthly rate from +17.60→+11.33 SOL/mo, monthly gate now fails (promotable=False). Defer promotion until strategy re-stabilizes above bar.
